data.title: Former Tesla Booster Now Warns Stock Faces Major Pain in 2025
data.description: Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management CEO Ross Gerber, a Tesla shareholder, anticipates a 50% plummet in the stock's price this year.

data.title: Apple Bows Out of UK's Cloud Encryption Amid Government's 'Backdoor' Demands
data.description: Apple has reportedly withdrawn its most secure cloud storage service, Advanced Data Protection (ADP), from the UK after the British government demanded secret access to user data.

data.title: John Legend & Chrissy Teigen Plan To Quit LA For New York After Wildfires. They Can Take Their Pick With $100 Million Fortune
Trump's Bid To Remove Watchdog Denied By Supreme Court — What's Behind His Urgency?
data.description: The Supreme Court has rejected a plea by President Trump for an immediate dismissal of Office of Special Counsel chief Hampton Dellinger.

data.title: Trump Says He Could Influence Putin To Free Kidnapped Ukrainian Children: 'It's Pretty Tough Stuff, But I Believe I Could Do That'
data.description: President Trump has expressed confidence in his ability to persuade Vladimir Putin to release thousands of Ukrainian children who have been kidnapped amid the ongoing conflict.
